title: AI Marketing Operations
required_skills: Build production AI workflows and tools (not demos)
Marketing operations experience (campaign workflows, content pipelines)
GitHub / structured documentation for AI agents
bonus_skills: AI-generated slide workflow for sales decks and presentations
Build custom internal interfaces and dashboards
Team enablement and internal documentation sharing
matched_skills: Marketing operations experience (campaign workflows via PMM roles at Futu Holdings and Leyard Europe)
missing_skills: Building real AI workflows or tools in production (no evidence in CV)
Content pipeline automation with AI tooling
Langdock platform or equivalent AI platform hands-on experience
core_responsibilities: Build and maintain marketing AI skills on the Langdock platform (brand voice assistants, research tools, brief generators, campaign reviewers)
Automate content workflows end-to-end, removing repetitive steps from draft to published output
Keep documentation AI-ready: structured in GitHub, written for AI agent consumption
Maintain AI-generated slide workflow for sales decks, workshop material, and customer presentations
Build custom internal interfaces, dashboards, and tools as needed; enable team by sharing and documenting what is built
recommended_emphasis: Any hands-on experience with AI tools or automation platforms (even personal/side projects)
Marketing operations process design and campaign workflow management
Technical adjacent skills: SQL, API familiarity, HubSpot/Salesforce automation rules
Structured documentation practices (Confluence, Jira, GitHub if applicable)
Ability to learn and apply new technical tools rapidly

company_info.size_raw: JD mentions 6,000+ customer companies; no employee headcount found in JD text
